title: post_page HTML endpoint leaks private/direct posts
description: In activitypub.rs post_page (line 391), the GET /@{username}/{post_id} HTML endpoint serves private and direct posts to any unauthenticated browser visitor without any visibility check. The query (line 401-403) only filters by account username and post ID, not by visibility. This is a distinct code path from the API endpoint covered in smallhold-9ouq.66 — it exposes the full content_html of private/direct posts in a public-facing HTML page, complete with OG metadata. The query should add AND visibility IN ('public', 'unlisted') or return 404 for restricted posts.
